Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
73 
PRVDR_AGE 
LABEL: 
Provider Age (in Years) 
DESCRIPTION: Provider age in years as of the end of the last month with a record in the APR, or date of death if date 
of death is before the end of the APR month. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_AGE 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_AGE 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
3 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
Numeric value representing
